calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Appearance (via ZOOM videoconference):
Russ Bolin, Esq. of the Law Offices of Kenosian & Miele LLP, Tel: 310.289.5177, for the plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff filed a declaration in compliance with CCP 439 on March 1, 2023. The court notes that the meet and confer is supposed to happen before the motion is filed. The court also finds plaintiff's declaration unclear as to how the meet and confer process was conducted.

After hearing, the court vacates its tentative ruling and orders that the hearing on PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is continued to March 29, 2023 at 9:30am in Department 302.

The court further instructs plaintiff's counsel to inform the defendant that he (the defendant) is expressly ordered by the court to comply with his meet and confer obligations.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order to this effect (in Word format) to jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
